title: Forge consome §16 rico (stories + verifiable) do DB

userStories.title: Migration — ProductRequirement.stories jsonb
userStories.description: ALTER ADD COLUMN stories jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'. Atualiza database.types.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Coluna stories existe em ProductRequirement com default '[]'

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProductRequirement' AND column_name='stories'

userStories.title: Schema único de story (Zod) reusado por planner/manifest/importer
userStories.description: Centraliza ForgeStorySchema (id, title, description?, acceptanceCriteria string[], verifiable.min(1), dependsOn, agentProfile, estimateMinutes, touches, passes?). planner reusa.
acceptanceCriteria: planner.ts importa o schema único (sem duplicar)

userStories.title: ManifestStory rico + snapshotManifest por-story (com fallback)
userStories.description: ManifestStory += verifiable/agentProfile/estimateMinutes/touches. snapshotManifest emite 1 story por item de PR.stories; fallback 1-story se vazio.
acceptanceCriteria: PRD com stories[] gera N manifest stories com verifiable
PRD com stories=[] gera 1 manifest story (comportamento atual)
Cada manifest story carrega ac (text) + verifiable

userStories.title: Validação bloqueante de verifiable no run-creation
userStories.description: createForgeRunFromSession rejeita PRD elegível cujo stories[] tenha story sem ≥1 verifiable (error 'story_without_verifiable').
acceptanceCriteria: Run com story sem verifiable falha com erro claro
Run com todas stories verifiáveis prossegue

userStories.title: Propagar verifiable manifest → prd.json local → worker
userStories.description: exec-forge-run.ts Story type += verifiable; ao escrever prd.json local, inclui verifiable/agentProfile. Worker já renderiza.
acceptanceCriteria: prd.json local escrito pelo daemon inclui verifiable por story
Prompt do worker lista os checks (já suportado)

userStories.title: Importer de backfill prd.json → ProductRequirement.stories
userStories.description: scripts/forge/import-prd-stories.ts lê scripts/ralph/features/<slug>/prd.json e grava userStories em ProductRequirement.stories casando por reference. Valida via ForgeStorySchema.
acceptanceCriteria: Rodar o importer popula stories dos PRDs por reference
Stories inválidas (sem verifiable) são reportadas, não gravadas

userStories.title: Smoke — PR rico vira run multi-story com verifiable
userStories.description: Backfill de 1 PRD (ex.: sial-core-process) → cria run → manifest tem N stories, cada uma com verifiable.
acceptanceCriteria: Manifest do run tem >1 story para o PRD
Toda story do manifest tem verifiable não-vazio

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT bool_and(jsonb_array_length(s->'verifiable')>0) FROM "ForgeRun", jsonb_array_elements(manifest->'prds'->0->'stories') s ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1
